name: Matteooooooooooooo
short_name: Mateo Oh Oh Oh Oh Oh Oh Oh Oh
lore:
Lore of Matteooooooooooooo
                                    


A distinctive character known as the big-nosed dwarf sports glasses, hats, and ties, serving as the loyal assistant to Brarr Brarr Patta Pim. Whenever an intruder dares to enter the forest, he takes action by hurling a stone as a warning. Mateo, who is both small and remarkably swift, often finds himself struck by this stone, oblivious to the presence of the intruders nearby. Nevertheless, this dwarf possesses a unique quality: if an individual openly expresses their intention to honor the forest and shows no desire to cause harm, he graciously guides them through the woods with respect and care.
This dwarf is indeed the assistant to Brrr Brr Pattapim. In moments when intruders invade the forest, he reacts by throwing stones as a means of intimidation. Mateo, being petite and agile, frequently ends up being hit by these stones, unaware of the approaching intruders. However, it's essential to note that if someone explicitly demonstrates a genuine respect for the forest and an absence of harmful intentions, this character will kindly lead them through the forest, acting as a benevolent guide.
Among the companions of this dwarf is Perochello Lemonchello, who shares in the adventures and experiences within the enchanting realm of the forest.
